remaining_lanes.description: Plugin browser, installer, config panel. Follows MCP electron-store pattern.
OAuth flow, workflow management, CI/CD status, PR creation from session changes.
Full-text search across sessions, filter by date/agent/model. Zero backend changes.
Export sanitized sessions to file, import from JSON/share URL. Isolated feature.
Fuzzy search, keyboard-only mode, plugin-contributed commands.

how_to_run_this_session.orchestrator_instruction: You are running 6 independent lanes to completion in a single session. Every wave fans out in parallel across all lanes.

wave_1_cartography.description: Fan out 6 cartographers simultaneously — one per lane. They share no files so there is zero contention.
subagents: cartographer → map plugin-management-ui (packages/plugin/, plugin IPC, renderer plugins)
cartographer → map github-integration-ui (CLI github module, API surface, PR flow)
cartographer → map session-search-filter (home.tsx, session list, existing search patterns)
cartographer → map export-import-sessions (existing fork/share dialogs, SDK export/import API)
cartographer → map command-palette-expansion (existing command palette, useCommand system)
cartographer → map subagent-delegation-ui (prompt-input.tsx, @mention system, agent list)

wave_2_planning.description: 6 architects plan in parallel. Each produces a plan artifact with its own boundary. Critic reviews run in parallel too.

wave_3_4_5_execution_validation_stress.description: Each lane runs executor → validator → stress independently. Contention only on shared dirty files — lane owners must read the coordination bus before touching shared files.
wave_3_4_5_execution_validation_stress.conflict_resolution: Use produce_fragment for i18n keys and IPC handler additions. Consolidator assembles at end.

wave_6_repair.description: Each lane handles its own stress findings independently. Max 3 repair cycles per lane.

wave_7_publish.description: Checkpoint commit each lane independently. Push once at end with all lanes. Run publish_checkpoint for each.
wave_7_publish.note: Each lane gets its own commit message. Push all commits in one git push.
